description:
Create a new Project in a Procore account. The new project is active by default.

#### Country and State codes
The `country_code` and `state_code` parameter values must conform to the ISO-3166 Alpha-2 specification.
See [Working with Country Codes](/documentation/country-codes) for additional information.
#### Recommendation
For accounts creating a significant number of projects (more than 300),  schedule these operations during non-business hours (5 P.M PST - 7 A.M PST) to optimize efficienc...

parameters.name: run_configurable_validations
parameters.description: If true, validations are run for the corresponding Configurable Field Set.

logo_id.description: Unique identifier for the Project logo

logo_url.description: The URL for the Project logo

is_demo.description: Indicates if the project is a test project

template.description: Indicates if the project is a template project

display_name.description: The display name for the Project

address.description: The street address for the Project

city.description: The city in which the Project is located

state_code.description: The state code for the Project (ISO-3166 Alpha-2 format)

country_code.description: The country code for the Project (ISO-3166 Alpha-2 format)

zip.description: The postal code for the Project

time_zone.description: The timezone in which the Project is located

tz_name.description: The tz-database version of the timezone for the Project

latitude.description: The geographic coordinate that specifies the north–south position of the Project on the Earth's surface.

longitude.description: The geographic coordinate that specifies the east–west position of the Project on the Earth's surface.

county.description: The county in which the Project is located

parent_job_id.description: Unique identifier for the Parent Job

id.description: The identifier for the parent project/job

name.description: The name for the parent project/job

from_project_template_id.description: Unique identifier for the Project Template used to create this project

square_feet.description: The total square footage for the Project

start_date.description: The date that the contract for the project is signed. Note: this field is a replacement to estimated_start_date and will mirror its value.

completion_date.description: The date that all parties agree the project meets or must meet “substantial completion”. Note: this field is a replacement to estimated_completion_date and will mirror its value.

total_value.description: The total amount of construction work performed, planned, or put in place during the project. Note: this field is a replacement to estimated_value and will mirror its value.

store_number.description: The store number for the Project

accounting_project_number.description: The accounting project number for the Project

designated_market_area.description: The designated market area the Project is located in

warranty_start_date.description: The start date for the Project Warranty

warranty_end_date.description: The end date for the Project Warranty

active.description: The active status for the Project

flag.description: The Project flag (Red, Yellow, or Green)

locale.description: The locale for the Project. (Note that your account may not have access to all locales.) (23 possible values)

phone.description: The telephone number for the Project

actual_start_date.description: The actual start date for the Project

projected_finish_date.description: The projected finish date for the Project

created_at.description: The date and time the Project was created

updated_at.description: The date and time the Project was last updated

origin_id.description: An external third-party identifier for the Project

origin_data.description: An external third-party data string associated with the Project

origin_code.description: An external third-party code associated with the Project

is_erp_integrated.description: True if project is ERP integrated

owners_project_id.description: A linked identifier for the Owner's Project

photo_id.description: The unique identifier for the Project Photo

photo_url.description: The URL for the Project photo

inbound_email.description: The inbound email address username suffix for the project.

inbound_email_address.description: The inbound email address for the project.

estimated_start_date.description: The Estimated Start Date of the Project Note: this field is now deprecated and will mirror the value of start_date until it is no longer supported.

estimated_completion_date.description: The Estimated Completion Date of the Project. Note: this field is now deprecated and will mirror the value of completion_date until it is no longer supported.

estimated_value.description: The Estimated Value of the project. Note: this field is now deprecated and will mirror the value of total_value until it is no longer supported.

sector.description: The sector of a project. (164 possible values)

work_scope.description: The work scope of a project.

delivery_method.description: The delivery method of a project.

title.description: The title of the persistent message for the Project

message.description: The text content for the Project persistent message

office.description: Office associated to the project or company main office if project does not set an office

project_bid_type_id.description: The identifier for the Project Bid Type

id.description: The identifier for the Project Bid Type

name.description: The name for the Project Bid Type

name.description: The name for the Project Program

id.description: The identifier for the Project Department

name.description: The name for the Project Department

id.description: The identifier for the Project Company

project_sector_id.description: Id of the project sector associated with the project.

company_id.description: The company identifier the project is associated with.

address.description: The street address of the project.

city.description: The city where the project is located.

country_code.description: The country code (ISO-3166 Alpha-2 format) where the project is located.

start_date.description: The date that the contract for the project is signed. Note: This field replaces estimated_start_date and will mirror its value.

completion_date.description: The date that all parties agree the project meets or must meet “substantial completion”. Note: This field replaces estimated_completion_date and will mirror its value.

total_value.description: The total amount of construction work performed, planned, or put in place during the project. Note: This field is a replacement of estimated_value and will mirror its value.

public_notes.description: The public notes for the project.

time_zone.description: The timezone where the project is located.

project_region_id.description: The project region id of the project.

project_template_id.description:
The project template identifier as designated by another project on this company.
It must be a project that is a template defined by `template: true`.

origin_id.description: External third-party identifier for the project.

origin_data.description: External third-party data string associated with the project.

origin_code.description: External third-party code associated with the project.

override_start_date.description: This is the date that the project started and will be displayed on the portfolio page.

override_start_date_check.description: This is the property that enables the use of the override_start_date as the Actual Start Date.

override_end_date.description: This is the date that the project will be finished and will be displayed on the portfolio page.

override_end_date_check.description: This is the property that enables the use of the override_end_date as the Projected Finish Date.

department_ids.description:
The department ids the project is associated with.
The array should represent all departments, so if the current value is `[1, 2, 3]` and want to remove department `2`, then send `[1, 3]`.

estimated_value.description: The estimated value of the project. Note: This field is now deprecated and will mirror the value of total_value until it is no longer supported.

estimated_start_date.description: The estimated start date of the project. Note: This field is now deprecated and will mirror the value of start_date until it is no longer supported.

estimated_completion_date.description: The estimated completion date of the project. Note: This field is now deprecated and will mirror the value of completion_date until it is no longer supported.

erp_integrated.description: The project will be ERP integrated.
